```{r, echo=FALSE, results="hide"}
set.seed(sample.int(.Machine$integer.max, 1))

## Parametros
theta  <- sample(c(1, 2, 3, 4, 5), 1)
n      <- sample(c(10, 15, 20, 25), 1)
sum_x  <- round(n / theta * runif(1, 0.8, 1.2), 2)

## Respostas: limite inferior do IC 95% para theta (Exponencial)
## 2*theta*sum_x ~ chi2_{2n}
## P(chi2_{2n,0.025} <= 2*theta*sum_x <= chi2_{2n,0.975}) = 0.95
## limite inferior: chi2_{2n,0.025} / (2*sum_x)
correct <- round(qchisq(0.025, 2 * n) / (2 * sum_x), 4)
w1 <- round(qchisq(0.975, 2 * n) / (2 * sum_x), 4)
w2 <- round(qchisq(0.025, 2 * n) / sum_x, 4)
w3 <- round(qchisq(0.025, n) / (2 * sum_x), 4)
w4 <- round(qchisq(0.025, 2 * n) * sum_x / 2, 4)

all_vals <- c(correct, w1, w2, w3, w4)
# Garante cinco alternativas numericamente distintas após a parametrização.
integer_choices <- all(abs(all_vals - round(all_vals)) < sqrt(.Machine$double.eps))
choice_step <- if (integer_choices) 1 else max(1e-4, max(abs(all_vals), na.rm = TRUE) * 0.01)
while (anyDuplicated(all_vals)) {
  duplicate_position <- which(duplicated(all_vals))[1]
  all_vals[duplicate_position] <- max(all_vals, na.rm = TRUE) + choice_step
}
choices <- sample(all_vals)
sol_pos <- which(choices == correct)
sol_str <- paste(as.integer(seq_along(choices) == sol_pos), collapse = "")
```

Question
========
Para $X_i \overset{\text{iid}}{\sim} \text{Exp}(\theta)$ (com media $1/\theta$), o pivo exato e $2\theta\sum_{i=1}^n X_i \sim \chi^2_{2n}$. Com $n = `r n`$ e $\sum X_i = `r sum_x`$, o limite inferior do IC 95% para $\theta$ e:

Answerlist
----------
* `r choices[1]`
* `r choices[2]`
* `r choices[3]`
* `r choices[4]`
* `r choices[5]`

Solution
========
Invertendo o pivo: $P\!\left(\frac{\chi^2_{2n,\,0{,}025}}{2\sum X_i} \leq \theta \leq \frac{\chi^2_{2n,\,0{,}975}}{2\sum X_i}\right) = 0{,}95$.

O limite inferior e $\chi^2_{`r 2*n`,\,0{,}025}/(2\sum X_i) = `r qchisq(0.025,2*n)`/(2 \times `r sum_x`) = `r correct`$.

Erros comuns: usar o quantil 0,975 (que da o limite superior); dividir por $\sum X_i$ sem o fator 2; usar $\chi^2_n$ em vez de $\chi^2_{2n}$; multiplicar em vez de dividir.

Meta-information
================
exname: Cap5S2Q5_IC_exponencial_exato
extype: schoice
exsolution: `r sol_str`
exshuffle: FALSE
